entries.round: task:Execute Phase 2 tasks from tasks.md: Polymarket Gamma API & Volatility Tracker. 1. Create 'services/gamma_poller.py' with an async class that polls 'https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events' every 60s. 2. Filter for events with volume > 500000. 3. Save new events to MongoDB 'tracked_events' and check if the current price of outcomes changed >= 10% from 'last_price'. 4. Send the 📈 POLYMARKET ALERT message via aiogram bot if bot_state.is_paused is False. 5. Add '/add_event <url>' command in main.py. Update tasks.md to check off Phase 2. Use <write_file>.
